name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
benefit: Rs. 6,000 per year (3 installments of Rs. 2,000)
eligibility: All small and marginal farmer families with cultivable land
how_to_apply: Visit CSC (Jan Seva Kendra) or apply online at pmkisan.gov.in

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
benefit: Crop insurance against natural calamities — loss paid at actual market value
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
premium: Kharif: 2%, Rabi: 1.5%, Horticulture: 5% of sum insured
how_to_apply: Through banks, CSC centers, insurance company agents

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
benefit: Short-term credit up to Rs. 3 lakh at 4% interest for crop cultivation
eligibility: Farmers, tenant farmers, SHG members engaged in farming
how_to_apply: Nearest bank branch (SBI, Kerala Bank, Cooperative Bank)

name: Karshaka Pension Scheme (Kerala)
benefit: Rs. 1,100 per month pension for aged farmers
eligibility: Kerala farmers above 60 years with land in their name
how_to_apply: Krishi Bhavan or online at edistrict.kerala.gov.in

name: Kerala Karshaka Sahayi (Free Seeds & Saplings)
benefit: Free/subsidized seeds, saplings, biofertilizers, and planting material
how_to_apply: Visit nearest Krishi Bhavan with land records
deadline: Seasonal — apply before monsoon (May) and winter (Oct)

name: Coconut Development Board Subsidies
benefit: Subsidy for coconut replanting Rs.40/plant, irrigation Rs.10,000/ha, mechanization 40%
eligibility: Coconut farmers with 0.1 ha or more plantation
how_to_apply: Online at coconutboard.gov.in or visit CDB regional office

name: Rubber Board Replanting Subsidy
benefit: Rs. 15,000/ha for replanting old rubber with new clones + free clone plants
eligibility: Rubber farmers with plants above 25 years or low-yielding plantations
how_to_apply: Rubber Board regional office or rubberboard.org.in

name: Agricultural Mechanization Scheme
benefit: 50% subsidy (up to Rs.75,000) on tractors, transplanters, harvesters, power tillers
eligibility: Individual farmers and FPOs registered in Kerala
how_to_apply: Krishi Bhavan or online at agrikerala.gov.in

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefit: Free soil testing and customized fertilizer recommendations
how_to_apply: Nearest Krishi Bhavan or Soil Testing Lab
